name: Get series
description: Get all series tracked by Sonarr. Pass series_id for details on a single series. Returns title, year, status, monitored state, season count and episode counts.

name: Build request
Format response
Lookup series
description: Search TVDB for a series by name. Returns candidates with tvdbId, title, year, network and overview. Use tvdbId with sonarr_add_series to add a series to Sonarr.

name: Build request
Format response
Add series
description: Add a series to Sonarr for monitoring and download. Use tvdbId from sonarr_lookup_series. Quality profile and root folder are auto-detected from Sonarr configuration if not specified.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["tvdb_id"],"properties":{"tvdb_id":{"type":"number","description":"TVDB ID from sonarr_lookup_series"},"quality_profile_id":{"type":"number","description":"Quality profile ID (optional, uses first available)"},"root_folder_path":{"type":"string","description":"Root folder path (optional, uses first available)"},"search_on_add":{"type":"boolean","description":"Search for missing episodes immediately after adding (default true)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get calendar
description: Get upcoming episodes from Sonarr. Defaults to the next 7 days. Returns series title, episode title, season/episode number, air date and whether the file is already downloaded.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"start_date":{"type":"string","description":"Start date ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (default today)"},"end_date":{"type":"string","description":"End date ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (default 7 days from now)"},"unmonitored":{"type":"boolean","description":"Include unmonitored episodes (default false)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get queue
description: Get the current Sonarr download queue. Returns series title, episode, download status, time left and file size.

name: Build request
Format response
